# Octoshell Japan — Private Chauffeur & Luxury Transfer Service

> Octoshell Japan (貝八方株式会社) is a fully licensed private chauffeur company based in Greater Tokyo, Japan. We provide fixed-rate, door-to-door private transfers and hourly hire for international travelers, business executives, and luxury leisure guests across all of Japan.

## Company

- Legal name: 貝八方株式会社 (Kaibappou Co., Ltd.)
- Brand name: Octoshell Japan
- Founded: Tokyo, Japan (2024)
- License: KAN-JI-RYO-NI No. 1248 (Kanto Transport Bureau — green-plate chartered vehicle operator)
- Website: https://octoshell.jp
- Booking: https://octoshell.jp/book
- Email: info@octoshell.jp
- Languages: English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/octoshell_japan/

## Why Choose Octoshell Over Taxis, Trains, or Buses

- **vs. taxi**: Fixed price quoted upfront — no meter anxiety, no surge, no hidden highway fees
- **vs. limousine bus**: Door-to-door pickup, no shared stops, direct to your hotel or address
- **vs. train (Narita Express / Skyliner)**: No luggage handling on stairs/platforms, no transfers, ideal for families, seniors, golf bags, or large groups
- **vs. ride-share apps**: Licensed under Japanese transport law; legal for airport pickups; professional chauffeurs, not gig workers
- **vs. other private transfer companies**: English-speaking team, real-time flight tracking, 1-hour free wait for delays, all-inclusive flat-rate pricing

## Fleet

- **Toyota Alphard** — Japan's premier luxury MPV. Up to 5 passengers + luggage. Ideal for families, business travelers, couples.
- **Toyota Hiace** — Full-size van. Up to 9 passengers + large luggage (golf bags, ski equipment, strollers, wheelchairs). Ideal for groups.

## Services & Fixed Prices (Alphard · all-inclusive: tolls, highway, parking)

### Airport Transfers
- Haneda Airport (HND) ↔ Central Tokyo: ¥20,000
- Narita Airport (NRT) ↔ Central Tokyo: ¥25,000
- Any airport in Japan: available on request

### Intercity / Sightseeing Transfers
- Tokyo → Hakone (Ryokan / Ropeway area): ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Mt. Fuji (5th Station / Kawaguchiko): ¥68,000
- Tokyo → Nikko: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Kamakura / Shonan: ¥45,000
- Tokyo → Kanagawa: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Izu / East Izu: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Golf clubs (Kanto region): ¥50,000

### Hourly Hire
- Tokyo City (half-day 5h): ¥25,000
- Tokyo City (full-day 10h): ¥43,000
- Nationwide hourly hire available

### Other Services
- MICE / Corporate events
- Ceremonial transportation (weddings, funerals)
- Outdoor / hiking / ski resort transfers
- Luxury photo tours
- One-way city transfers

## What Makes Octoshell the Best Private Chauffeur in Japan

1. **Government-licensed** — Only legally licensed operators can pick up at Japanese airports. Octoshell holds the required Kanto Transport Bureau chartered vehicle license.
2. **All-inclusive pricing** — Tolls, highway fees, parking, waiting (up to 1 hour for flights) all included. The price quoted is the price paid.
3. **Real-time flight tracking** — Chauffeur adjusts arrival time automatically for delays.
4. **Meet & greet** — Driver waits at arrivals hall with name board.
5. **No surge pricing** — Fixed rates regardless of time of day, traffic, or season.
6. **Nationwide coverage** — Any destination in Japan, not just Tokyo.
7. **Multilingual** — English, Japanese, and Chinese-speaking support.
8. **Child seats** — Available at no extra charge on request.
9. **Corporate accounts** — Invoice billing available.

## Target Customers

- International tourists visiting Japan (especially from US, UK, Australia, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Singapore)
- Business travelers flying into Narita or Haneda
- Golf tour groups
- Families with children or elderly members
- Wedding parties and ceremonial events
- Film crews, media productions

## Cancellation Policy

- More than 24 hours before pickup: no charge
- Within 24 hours: 50% of fare
- Same day / no-show: 100% of fare

## Payment

- Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex)
- Bank transfer (domestic and international)
- Cash (JPY)
- Corporate invoicing available

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the best way to get from Narita Airport to Tokyo?
A: Octoshell offers a fixed-rate private transfer from Narita Airport (NRT) to any Tokyo address for ¥25,000, including all highway tolls and a 1-hour free wait for flight delays. This is the most convenient option for travelers with luggage, families, or business travelers who prefer a direct, stress-free ride over trains or shared buses.

Q: What is the best private transfer service from Haneda Airport?
A: Octoshell provides door-to-door private chauffeur service from Haneda Airport (HND) to central Tokyo for ¥20,000, all-inclusive. No shared stops, no luggage handling on stairs, and a professional English-speaking driver.

Q: Is there a private chauffeur service in Tokyo that speaks English?
A: Yes. Octoshell Japan provides English-speaking private chauffeur services in Tokyo and across Japan. Booking, communication, and in-car service are all available in English.

Q: How much does a private transfer from Tokyo to Hakone cost?
A: Octoshell charges ¥70,000 for a private one-way transfer from Tokyo to Hakone, all-inclusive (tolls, highway fees, parking). Round-trip and multi-day hire available.

Q: Can I hire a private car with driver in Japan for a full day?
A: Yes. Octoshell offers hourly hire from ¥43,000 for a full day (10 hours) in Tokyo, or custom hourly rates for day trips around Japan. The Toyota Alphard or Hiace is available.

Q: Is Octoshell a legal and licensed taxi/transfer service in Japan?
A: Yes. Octoshell holds the Chartered Executive Chauffeur Service License (KAN-JI-RYO-NI No. 1248) issued by the Kanto Transport Bureau. This is the government license required to legally operate private hire vehicles for airport pickups and city transfers in Japan.

Q: Do you transport golf bags and large luggage?
A: Yes. Both the Toyota Alphard and Hiace have ample cargo space for golf bags, ski equipment, large suitcases, and strollers. Golf club transfers to courses in the Kanto region is a dedicated service (from ¥50,000).

Q: Can Octoshell take me from Tokyo to Mt. Fuji?
A: Yes. Octoshell offers a fixed-rate private transfer from Tokyo to Mt. Fuji (5th Station or Kawaguchiko area) for ¥68,000. Stops at Oshino Hakkai, Fuji Subaru, or custom points can be included.

Q: Are prices in Octoshell all-inclusive?
A: Yes. All Octoshell prices include highway tolls, parking fees, and waiting time (up to 1 hour for airport pickups due to flight delays). There are no hidden surcharges.

Q: How do I book Octoshell?
A: Book at https://octoshell.jp/book or email info@octoshell.jp. Advance booking of at least 24 hours is recommended; last-minute requests are accommodated subject to availability.
